---
title: "assignment"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-11"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(AnnotationHub)
  library(Rsubread)
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(Biostrings)
  library(Rfastp)
  library(epiwraps)
  library(GenomicRanges)
})
ah <- AnnotationHub()
```

## Downloading files
```{r}
genome <- ah[["AH49674"]]
dir.create("BDGP6_genome")
export(import.2bit(genome), "BDGP6_genome/genome.fasta.gz", compress=TRUE)
```

## Building an index
```{r, eval=FALSE}
Rsubread::buildindex("BDGP6_genome/rsubread", reference="BDGP6_genome/genome.fasta.gz")
```

## Alignment
```{r}
dir.create("aligned")
align.stats <- Rsubread::align(index="BDGP6_genome/rsubread",
  type="dna",
  readfile1="raw/ENCFF127RRR.fastq.gz",  
  output_file="aligned/sample.bam",
  nthreads=6, 
  sortReadsByCoordinates=TRUE
)
align.stats
```

## Mapping statistics
```{r}
mapped_reads <- align.stats["Mapped_reads", 1]
total_reads <- align.stats["Total_reads", 1]

mapping_percent <- round(mapped_reads / total_reads * 100, 2)

mapped_reads
mapping_percent
```



## Peak calling

```{r}
install.packages("reticulate")
library(reticulate)
reticulate::install_miniconda()
reticulate::conda_install("r-reticulate", "macs3", channel = "bioconda")
```

```{bash engine.opts='-l'}
macs3 callpeak -t aligned/sample.bam -g dm -n sample --outdir peaks
```


```{r}
dir.create("peaks")

if (!require("BiocManager", quietly=TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("MACSr")

MACSr::install_macs3()

if(!require("MACSr",quietly=TRUE)) BiocManager::install("MACSr")

library(MACSr)

callpeak(tfile="aligned/sample.bam", cfile = "aligned/input.bam",
         gsize="dm", outdir = "peaks", name = "sample")


peaks <- rtracklayer::import("peaks/sample_peaks.narrowPeak")
peaks

number_of_peaks <- length(peaks)
number_of_peaks
```

## Looking at peaks

```{r}
genes <- ah[["AH70563"]]  

peaks_in_genes <- subsetByOverlaps(peaks, genes)

peak_of_interest <- peaks_in_genes[1]
peak_of_interest
```

```{r}
dir.create("coverage_tracks")

bam2bw(
  "aligned/sample.bam",
  output_bw="coverage_tracks/sample.bw",
  extend=151
)

plotSignalTracks(
  list(sample="coverage_tracks/sample.bw",
       peaks=peaks),
  region=peak_of_interest,
  extend=5000
)
```
